headline: Why FedEx (FDX) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of parcel and cargo delivery company FedEx (NYSE:FDX) jumped 4.1% in the afternoon session after ship-tracking services reported the first vessels passing through the Strait of Hormuz as the U.S. and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire.

raw.headline: Why FedEx (FDX) Stock Is Trading Up Today
raw.summary: Shares of parcel and cargo delivery company FedEx (NYSE:FDX) jumped 4.1% in the afternoon session after ship-tracking services reported the first vessels passing through the Strait of Hormuz as the U.S. and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire.

headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid FDX and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: What a time it’s been for FedEx. In the past six months alone, the company’s stock price has increased by a massive 51.3%, reaching $363.01 per share. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: ezCater Rebrands to Reflect Expansion from Marketplace to Enterprise Workplace Food Platform
summary: BOSTON, April 08, 2026--ezCater, the #1 food tech platform for workplaces in the US, today unveiled a new brand identity, marking its evolution from a transactional catering marketplace into an enterprise-grade workplace food platform. The new identity reflects years of strategic development of enterprise capabilities, designed to solve the complex logistical challenges of feeding today’s workforce at scale.

headline: New Ownership of Pak Mail in Grand Rapids, Michigan Brings Fresh Energy to the Business--Serving the Community with Shipping and Office Services for More Than 30 Years
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing Pak Mail location in Grand Rapids, MI to new owners, Ellen Washington and Patricia Ouellette. This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will benefit from the essential shipping and office services provided by this Pak Mail for more than 30 years.

summary: MEMPHIS, Tenn., April 08, 2026--FedEx Freight will host its inaugural Investor Day at the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) in New York City today, ahead of its planned spinoff from FedEx Corporation (NYSE: FDX).

headline: Amazon USPS Delivery Pact Poses New Questions For FedEx Investors
summary: Amazon and the U.S. Postal Service have finalized a large delivery partnership to handle over 1 billion packages annually. The agreement is expected to cover the majority of Amazon's deliveries and reshapes the competitive position for NYSE:FDX in e commerce shipping. This development introduces a sizable shift in how Amazon routes parcels that might otherwise flow through private carriers. FedEx, trading as NYSE:FDX, is a major global logistics and parcel delivery company with significant...
